key.name: release-page-style
key.description: Visual style for the release page: classic or accent

key.name: accent-fade-duration
key.description: Duration of accent gradient fade-in animation in milliseconds (100–3000)

key.name: accent-mobile-enabled
key.description: Show accent gradient in narrow/mobile layout (experimental)

key.name: accent-glass-effect
key.description: Overlay subtle noise on the accent gradient for a frosted glass look

key.name: player-show-close-button
key.description: Show close window button in the video player top bar

key.name: episodes-view
key.description: How to display episodes: list or grid

key.name: blur-unwatched-episodes
key.description: Apply blur effect to episode preview images that have not been watched yet

key.name: tags-view-mode
key.description: Display mode for tags tab: cards or list

key.name: navbar-desktop
key.description: JSON array of tab IDs defining order and visibility in wide layout

key.name: navbar-mobile
key.description: JSON array of tab IDs defining order and visibility in narrow layout

key.name: navbar-sheet-style
key.description: Display style for the navigation bottom sheet: grid (icons) or list (rows)

key.name: navbar-sync
key.description: When true, mobile navigation uses the desktop tab order

key.name: search-category-order
key.description: JSON array of category IDs defining display order in search results
